mode_of_action_summary: Combination of dinotefuran and pymetrozine provides dual action control of sucking pests. Dinotefuran disrupts insect nervous system causing paralysis, while pymetrozine blocks feeding, preventing further crop damage and virus transmission.

active_ingredients.name: Dinotefuran
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: nAChR agonist causing nervous system disruption

active_ingredients.name: Pymetrozine
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: Feeding blocker affecting insect stylet movement

pest_behavior.sap_sucking: Pests suck plant sap and reduce vigor
pest_behavior.virus_transmission: Whitefly and aphids transmit viral diseases
pest_behavior.feeding_damage: Continuous feeding causes leaf curling and honeydew formation

farmer_problem_queries: virus spread ho raha hai whitefly se

application_details.method: Uniform spray covering upper and lower leaf surfaces
application_details.coverage: Ensure full leaf coverage for systemic absorption

farmer_benefits: تیلا فوراً کھانا چھوڑ دیندا اے
پودا جلدی ٹھیک ہو جاندا اے

multilingual_description.english: Dual action systemic insecticide for effective control of sucking pests.
multilingual_description.urdu: چوسنے والے کیڑوں کے لیے ڈبل ایکشن دوا۔
multilingual_description.punjabi: چوسن والے کیڑیاں لئی ڈبل ایکشن سپرے۔

embedding_text: Rippet insecticide contains dinotefuran and pymetrozine and is used for control of sucking pests like whitefly aphid jassid and hopper in cotton rice and vegetables. It provides dual action by stopping feeding and killing pests and also reduces virus transmission.
